title: Emily 23rd birthday voicemail — first take, Nov 13 2025
html:
16-second false start of the Emily 23rd birthday voicemail — Yahir gets two sentences in ("voice memo Emily, happy 23rd motherfucking birthday, it's your Michael Jordan here, um…") and re-records. Same Texan West Campus / 2 AM moment, paired with its take-2 sibling.

emily stevens · the emily arc · austin tx · 2025 11 13 texan west campus 2 · recording as note

related.label: Emily 23rd birthday voicemail — Nov 13 2025 (Texan West Campus)
